shoes.title: Onitsuka Tiger MEXICO 66
shoes.author: Onitsuka Tiger
shoes.description: The Onitsuka Tiger MEXICO 66 combines heritage design with modern comfort. First introduced in 1966, it remains one of the brand’s most iconic and timeless sneakers.

shoes.title: Onitsuka Tiger TOKUTEN
shoes.author: Onitsuka Tiger
shoes.description: The 'TOKUTEN' is an alluring pair inspired by 1980s archives, reinterpreting indoor court shoes with a modern twist. Its low-profile, classic design creates a sleek and streamlined silhouette, adding an elegant touch to any look.

shoes.title: Adidas-Copa-Pure-3-League-Unisex-Core-Black
shoes.author: Adidas
shoes.description: In every match on artificial turf, what impressed me was not only the technique but also the quality of the equipment. My parents gave me a pair of Adidas Copa Pure 3 League ‘Core Black’ football boots (code JR2852) – a “steel weapon” that helps me feel more confident in every situation.

shoes.title: Adidas-Barreda-Decode-Core-Black-Off-White
shoes.author: Adidas
shoes.description: In the world of modern sports fashion, Adidas has always been one of the pioneering brands in combining performance and style.

shoes.title: Adidas-Duramo-SL-2.0-Core-Black
shoes.author: Adidas
shoes.description: Adidas Duramo SL 2.0 ‘Core Black’ (IH8217) is the ideal sports shoe for those who love simplicity, efficiency and ease of use in both training and daily activities.

shoes.title: Adidas-Barreda-DecodeCyber-Metallic
shoes.author: Adidas
shoes.description: On a sunny day, I received a surprise gift from my mother: a pair of Adidas Barreda Decode ‘Cyber Metallic’ ‘JR1218’ shoes.

shoes.title: Adidas-Adizero-Boston-13-White
shoes.author: Adidas
shoes.description: Part of adidas' high-performance running line, the Adizero Boston 13 'White' (JR4791) is designed for athletes looking to accelerate and maintain stability over long distances.

shoes.title: Adidas-Barreda-Decode-Core-White-Alumina-Off-White
shoes.author: Adidas
shoes.description: Among Adidas' groundbreaking designs, the Barreda Decode 'Core White Alumina Off White' (code JR1228) stands out as a symbol of sophistication and modernity.

shoes.title: Air-Jordan-1-Low-Grey-White-
shoes.author: Jordan Shoes
shoes.description: Among the myriad of outstanding shoes on the market, Air Jordan 1 Low 'Grey White' code 553558-044 stands out as a symbol of minimalism, sophistication and charm.

shoes.title: Giay-Air-Jordan-1-Mid-Hemp
shoes.author: Jordan Shoes
shoes.description: The ‘Hemp’ version (DQ8426-200) offers a neutral color, blending earthy brown and beige tones, creating a warm vintage feel but still extremely dynamic and youthful.

shoes.title: Giay-Air-Jordan-4-RM-Dark-Mocha
shoes.author: Jordan Shoes
shoes.description: In the sneaker world, the Air Jordan line has always held a special place – not only because of the legacy associated with the legendary Michael Jordan, but also because of the designs that are always iconic and constantly innovative. Recently, Nike has brought a new breeze with the Air Jordan 4 RM ‘Dark Mocha’ version – IB7693-001, a combination of classic spirit and modern, personality-filled design.
